allow: PowerShell(if \(Test-Path G:\\flutter_sdk.zip\) { "partial size: {0:N0} bytes" -f \(Get-Item G:\\flutter_sdk.zip\).Length } else { "no partial file" })

PowerShell(curl.exe -sSL -C - --retry 20 --retry-all-errors --retry-delay 2 -o G:\\flutter_sdk.zip https://storage.googleapis.com/flutter_infra_release/releases/stable/windows/flutter_windows_3.44.1-stable.zip; if \($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0\) { tar -xf G:\\flutter_sdk.zip -C G:\\; if \($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0\) { "EXTRACTED OK" } else { "EXTRACT FAILED" } } else { "DOWNLOAD FAILED \($LASTEXITCODE\)" })

PowerShell($dirs = "lib\\features\\list","lib\\features\\detail","lib\\features\\edit","lib\\features\\settings","lib\\features\\sync","lib\\services","lib\\bridge"; foreach \($d in $dirs\) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force "G:\\claude_code\\private_key_management\\app\\$d" | Out-Null; New-Item -ItemType File -Path "G:\\claude_code\\private_key_management\\app\\$d\\.gitkeep" -Force | Out-Null }; "skeleton dirs created")
